# Damir and Ched

Young workers carrying heavy pickaxes to break stone... or monsters.

> **Ancestry:** Faun
> **Community:** Ridgeborne
> **Role:** Laborer

## Features

**Opportunist:** Whenever an ally fails an attack roll, **place 1 token** on this card.

**Brutal Strike:** **Spend 3 tokens** to have _Damir and Ched_ deal **2d6+3** physical damage to an adversary within Melee range.

> **Design notes:** At my table, they serve as the “comic relief” characters, inspired by Laurel and Hardy. They’re useless, cowardly, and oddly cocky, but somehow, they always end up taking credit for the players’ deeds.
